name: vscode-brain
description: Query the NanoClaw second-brain from inside VS Code: recall on the symbol under the cursor, on the current selection, or jump to the current repo's journal.

brain.apiUrl.description: Base URL of the NanoClaw brain miniapp's HTTP API.

brain.serviceTokenPath.description: Path to a file containing NANOCLAW_SERVICE_TOKEN. Loopback requests work without a token; this is only needed if you set BRAIN_API_URL to a non-localhost address.

brain.limit.description: Number of recall hits to fetch per query.

brain.scoreFloor.description: Drop hits whose finalScore is below this (0..1). Lower than agent auto-recall's 0.25 since the user is asking explicitly here — they'd rather see borderline hits than a blank panel.
